sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n1797" key="a)e/xeia" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀέχεια</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n1797.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">non-possession, privation</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1264.tlg001:2:51" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Chrysipp.Stoic.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.51</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
